ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Continued To Aug-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (One Daniel Burnham Court No. 308, San Francisco, Ca 94109)
MINI MINUTES: Lilian Ng, appearing for Special Administrator, Rena Harel. Property is located at One Dan Burnham Court #308. Terms of sale stated by counsel. The sale was confirmed at $382,000.00 by overbid subject by written order. The bond was increased to $466,000.00.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. Mc Math. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk:Larrisa Dotson
Baliff:Aguerre

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Of Disputed Claim Against Trust Estate
Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 289238. Lillian Ng appearing for Rena Harel. Bart Cchenone appearing for Wesley Chang. Derek Jacobson and Ligia Parmenter appearing for Linda Holm Nishimura. No opposition to bringing the trust under court supervision. Matter granted. Order signed.

In case number 289328, Estate of Arvid Holm. Case is almost settled. All parties agreed to have Rena Harel appointed as administrator w/wa. Bond is fixed in the amount of $650,000.00. Matter granted. Order signed. Ms. Ng will petition ex parte for approval of settlement agreement.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-06-2006 Continued To Jan-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Edward A. Koplowitz appearing for petitioner. Derek Jacobson and Ligia Parmenter appearing for Linda Holm. Lillian Ng appearing for Special Administrator Rena Harel. Bart Schenone appearing for petitioner. All parties agreed to a continuance and to extension of Special Letters with general powers to 1/17/07. Matter is continued to 1/17/07. Order extending Special Letters with general powers signed. Ms. Ng is also requesting to extend the temporary successor trustee from 12/14 to 1/17/07. Her request is granted. She will call the calendar clerk to continue the Trust matter. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-06-2006 Continued To Jan-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
